cover: Split-screen comparison infographic: 'Claude Sonnet 4.7 vs GPT-5.5 for Salesforce Agents'. Deep navy blue bold header. LEFT COLUMN 'Claude Sonnet 4.7' (soft green/blue, bold blue-grey header box): blocks for 'strong instruction following', 'safe long-context case reasoning', 'predictable Salesforce tool orchestration' each with small icon. Central flow diagram showing Account, Case, Knowledge, Data Cloud Vector Search routed through an Agentforce 2.0 action. RIGHT COLUMN 'GPT-5.5' (soft blue/purple, bright blue header box): blocks for 'broad reasoning', 'fast agent planning', 'excellent structured JSON outputs'. Central glowing node 'Model Router' with clean straight lines to Agentforce Topic, Apex v64.0 Action, LWC Console. Speedometer labeled LATENCY pointing green. Clean vector SaaS aesthetic, deep navy/teal/blue palette on light blue-grey background.
images:
A highly detailed, technical blueprint-style developer infographic poster on the theme of "MODEL SELECTION FOR SALESFORCE TASKS".
Overall Theme: High-tech dark mode developer dashboard, cybersecurity blueprint, with sharp glowing lines and neat borders.
Colors: Deep dark navy background with glowing neon blue, electric cyan, warning red, and success green highlights.

Header:
- A prominent top-center glowing blue header: "MODEL SELECTION FOR SALESFORCE TASKS".
- Below it, a clean subtitle: "claude-sonnet-4-7 vs gpt-5.5 — Where Each Wins in Enterprise Agents" with a small Salesforce logo on the top-left and an "APEX BEST PRACTICES" badge on the top-right.

Section 1: "WHY IT MATTERS" (Top Row, 3 Horizontal Cards)
- "Right Tool" with a target icon, "Lower Cost" with a chart icon, "Faster P95" with a clock icon

Section 2: "THE COST" (Middle Row, Side-by-Side Comparison)
- Left Box (Red Theme): "WRONG: Use Same Model for Every Task". Shows a red status pill "DANGER — ANTI-PATTERN".
- Right Box (Green Theme): "RIGHT: Route Task Type to Best Model". Shows a green status pill "SUCCESS — BEST PRACTICE".

Section 3: "CODE PATTERNS" (Main Center)
- Left Column (Bad Code in Red Border):
  - Heading: "// BAD"
  - Code block:
    // Using gpt-5.5 for everything (expensive, slow)
// OR claude-sonnet-4-7 for everything (misses edge cases)
// Same model for triage, enrichment, reasoning,
// and JSON transformation = wrong tradeoff every time
const model = 'gpt-5.5' // one size fits none well
- Right Column (Good Code in Green Border):
  - Heading: "// GOOD"
  - Code block:
    const MODEL_ROUTER = {
  // Long-context policy checks + case triage
  compliance: 'claude-sonnet-4-7',
  // Multi-step orchestration + JSON transform
  orchestration: 'gpt-5.5',
  // Deep reasoning chains: warranty edge cases
  reasoning: 'o3',
  // High-volume fast classification
  batch: 'claude-haiku-4-7',
}

Section 4: "DEVELOPER PROFILE & CHECKLIST" (Bottom Row)
- Left Side: A 3D Pixar-style cartoon avatar portrait of a dark-skinned South Asian male with a full thick black beard, shoulder-length wavy dark hair pulled up into a messy top bun, warm friendly smile showing teeth, wearing a grey crew-neck sweatshirt with the word "MAGNETIC" on it, set against a warm orange bokeh background. The avatar is labeled "Bennie Joseph | Salesforce Architect". Next to it is a quote bubble: "Architecting intuitive systems, engineering scalable solutions."
- Right Side: A checklist with points: "claude-sonnet-4-7: case triage, policy checks, KB-grounded drafts", "gpt-5.5: lead enrichment, multi-step orchestration, data transforms", "o3: warranty edge cases, compliance reasoning, ambiguous appeals", "claude-haiku-4-7: high-volume pre-classification before routing", "Benchmark each model on YOUR data — marketing claims ≠ production".
- Footer: A thin bar with icons for "claude-sonnet-4-7", "gpt-5.5", "Model Routing", "Agentforce 2.0" and the text "CODE SMART. AUTOMATE FASTER. DELIVER EXCELLENCE."

Style Details: Super high resolution, technical drawing grid, razor-sharp white and neon text, crisp layout, developer IDE aesthetic, flat vector graphics with subtle glow, highly legible monospace font for code blocks, professional presentation.

A highly detailed, technical blueprint-style developer infographic poster on the theme of "SALESFORCE AGENT ROUTING ARCHITECTURE".
Overall Theme: High-tech dark mode developer dashboard, cybersecurity blueprint, with sharp glowing lines and neat borders.
Colors: Deep dark navy background with glowing neon blue, electric cyan, warning red, and success green highlights.

Header:
- A prominent top-center glowing blue header: "SALESFORCE AGENT ROUTING ARCHITECTURE".
- Below it, a clean subtitle: "How to Wire a Task Classifier in Front of Multiple LLMs" with a small Salesforce logo on the top-left and an "APEX BEST PRACTICES" badge on the top-right.

Section 1: "WHY IT MATTERS" (Top Row, 3 Horizontal Cards)
- "Targeted Context" with a target icon, "Cost Optimised" with a chart icon, "Tunable per Type" with a layers icon

Section 2: "THE COST" (Middle Row, Side-by-Side Comparison)
- Left Box (Red Theme): "SINGLE MODEL — Wrong Tradeoff Every Task". Shows a red status pill "DANGER — ANTI-PATTERN".
- Right Box (Green Theme): "ROUTED ARCHITECTURE — Model Per Task Class". Shows a green status pill "SUCCESS — BEST PRACTICE".

Section 3: "CODE PATTERNS" (Main Center)
- Left Column (Bad Code in Red Border):
  - Heading: "// BAD"
  - Code block:
    // Routing decision hardcoded in prompts (fragile)
const system = 'If the case is about compliance use
  formal tone. If about billing be concise. If about
  tech support include KB articles...'
// 4,000-token system prompt trying to be 4 models
// Low accuracy. High cost. Impossible to tune.
- Right Column (Good Code in Green Border):
  - Heading: "// GOOD"
  - Code block:
    // Lightweight classifier routes to right model
const taskType = await classifyTask(caseSubject)
// 'compliance' → anthropic claude-sonnet-4-7
//   with full policy context (200K window used)
// 'enrichment' → openai gpt-5.5
//   with CRM schema + structured output
// 'reasoning' → openai o3
//   for warranty edge case resolution

Section 4: "DEVELOPER PROFILE & CHECKLIST" (Bottom Row)
- Left Side: A 3D Pixar-style cartoon avatar portrait of a dark-skinned South Asian male with a full thick black beard, shoulder-length wavy dark hair pulled up into a messy top bun, warm friendly smile showing teeth, wearing a grey crew-neck sweatshirt with the word "MAGNETIC" on it, set against a warm orange bokeh background. The avatar is labeled "Bennie Joseph | Salesforce Architect". Next to it is a quote bubble: "Architecting intuitive systems, engineering scalable solutions."
- Right Side: A checklist with points: "Fast classifier first — adds < 200ms, saves 10x on cost", "Each model gets a focused system prompt for its task class", "claude-sonnet-4-7: inject full KB + entitlement in context", "gpt-5.5: inject CRM schema and structured output spec", "Log model choice + confidence + task type for every run".
- Footer: A thin bar with icons for "Model Routing", "Task Classification", "Agentforce 2.0", "Cost Control" and the text "CODE SMART. AUTOMATE FASTER. DELIVER EXCELLENCE."

Style Details: Super high resolution, technical drawing grid, razor-sharp white and neon text, crisp layout, developer IDE aesthetic, flat vector graphics with subtle glow, highly legible monospace font for code blocks, professional presentation.
